SHOULD_FLAG - Anti-Patterns That Must Be Detected

"Side-stripe border on card"

This card has a side-stripe border that should be flagged.

"Gradient text pattern"

This gradient text should be flagged.

"Gray text on colored background"

This gray text on blue background should be flagged.

"Nested cards"

Outer card

Inner card (should be flagged)

"Skipped heading level"

Main Heading

Skipped h2 (should be flagged)

"Bounce easing"

SHOULD_PASS - Valid Patterns That Must Not Be Flagged

"Valid 1px border"

1px border is valid and should pass.

"Solid color text"

Solid colored text is valid.

"High contrast text on colored"

White text on blue is valid contrast.

"Proper heading hierarchy"

Subtitle

Sub-subtitle

"Valid ease-out"

"Valid flexbox layout"

Item 1
Item 2
Item 3
